meta_title: AirMCP — Connect AI to Your Entire Apple Ecosystem
meta_description: Open-source MCP server with 226 tools across 24 modules. Connect Claude, Codex, and any MCP client to Apple apps.
hero_tagline: Connect AI to your entire Apple ecosystem.
hero_sub: 226 tools. 30 prompts. 11 resources. One MCP server.
modules_sub: Native. Fast. Built on AppleScript and Apple frameworks.
mod_notes_p: Create, search, and manage Apple Notes.
mod_reminders_p: Manage lists, due dates, and priorities.
mod_tv_p: Browse and control Apple TV app.
mod_system_p: Dark mode, volume, WiFi, Bluetooth, and more.
mod_safari_p: Tabs, reading list, and page content.
mod_bluetooth_p: Scan, connect, and manage BLE devices.
mod_intelligence_p: Apple Intelligence writing tools and image generation.
detail_notes: Full Apple Notes integration — create, read, update, and delete notes and folders. Search by title or body content. Supports rich text and HTML note bodies.
detail_reminders: Complete Reminders management — create tasks with due dates, priorities, and recurrence. Manage lists, mark complete, and query overdue items.
detail_calendar: Calendar event management with EventKit — create, modify, and delete events. Check availability, list calendars, and handle recurring events.
detail_contacts: Access the macOS Contacts database — search by name, email, or phone. Create and update contact records with full field support.
detail_mail: Read, compose, send, and manage email through Apple Mail. Search messages, handle attachments, and manage mailboxes.
detail_messages: Read recent iMessage conversations and send messages. Access chat history and manage conversations.
detail_music: Control Apple Music playback — play, pause, skip, shuffle, repeat. Manage playlists, search the library, and get now-playing info.
detail_photos: Access the Photos library — browse albums, search by date or keyword, get photo metadata and file paths.
detail_tv: Browse and control the Apple TV app — search content, manage the watch list, and control playback.
detail_podcasts: Browse podcast shows and episodes. Control playback, manage subscriptions, and search the podcast catalog.
detail_system: System-level controls — toggle dark mode, adjust volume and brightness, check battery, manage WiFi and Bluetooth, clipboard, notifications, and more.
detail_finder: File system operations through Finder — browse directories, move, copy, rename, trash files, and get file info.
detail_safari: Safari browser automation — manage tabs, access reading list, get page content, execute JavaScript, and manage bookmarks.
detail_screen: Capture screenshots and screen recordings. Take full-screen, window, or region captures with configurable output.
detail_maps: Search locations, get directions, and calculate distances using Apple Maps. Drop pins and manage favorites.
detail_shortcuts: Run Shortcuts automations, list available shortcuts, get shortcut details, and manage the Shortcuts library.
detail_intelligence: Apple Intelligence integration (macOS 26+) — writing tools for proofreading, rewriting, and summarization. Image generation with Image Playground.
detail_ui: Accessibility-based UI automation — inspect UI elements, click buttons, read text, and interact with any app's interface.
step1_desc: Interactive setup wizard. Choose your modules.
step2_desc: Add one JSON block to any MCP client.
step3_desc: AI reads notes, manages calendar, sends mail, and more.
config_desc: Add this to Claude Code, Codex, or any MCP client.
wf_sub: Pre-built prompts that orchestrate multiple Apple apps together.
wf_daily: Summarize today's events, due reminders, and recent notes.
wf_weekly: Review the past week and plan ahead.
wf_meeting: Pull event details, search notes, build context.
wf_research: Research topics using Safari, save findings to Notes.
wf_focus: Check conflicts, prioritize reminders, manage music.
wf_file: Scan a folder, categorize, summarize in Notes.
wf_followup: After a meeting, create follow-up notes and action items automatically.
install_sub: Install globally, or run directly with npx.
install_note: Requires Node.js 18+ and macOS. Works with Claude Code, Codex, and any MCP client.
footer_tagline: Built for Claude Code, Codex, and every MCP client.
